headline: What's going on in today's session: dow jones movers
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the dow jones index in the middle of the day on Monday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: 3M Young Scientist Challenge Names 10 Finalists for 2026 National Competition
summary: 3M and Discovery Education today announced the 10 finalists in the 2026 3M Young Scientist Challenge, the nation's premier middle school science competition. Now in its 19th year, the annual challenge invites students in fifth through eighth grade to think creatively and apply the power of STEM to develop real-world solutions.
